title: Dogfood P2 operator visibility E2E
goal: Implement the next P2 backlog slice end-to-end: merged live output, compact status/watch, event rollover visibility, dogfood backlog support, and layered-review ergonomics.

decisions.title: Operator visibility as one E2E slice
decisions.rationale: The remaining P2 items all reduce lead-agent/TUI friction during long workflows, so they should be tested together with multi-agent run fixtures.

decisions.title: Low-noise status first
decisions.rationale: Dogfood repeatedly showed raw run.json dumps and long sleep helpers are painful. The compact status/watch command should be designed for both humans and lead agents.

decisions.title: Mandatory lead review after agents
decisions.rationale: Recent model-review stacks missed important edge cases; the lead must review actual rendered/status behavior before merge.

phases.name: implementation
phases.title: Implementation
phases.goal: Implement P2 operator visibility and dogfood ergonomics improvements.

checks.name: operator visibility focused tests
checks.cmd: python3 -m pytest tests/test_workflow.py -q -k 'watch or status or live_output or rollover or dogfood or layered'

jobs.name: p2-operator-visibility
jobs.prompt:
You are already running as the ccc @mimo25p implementation worker. Do not run ccc, do not spawn/delegate to another agent, and do not say you will use ccc @mimo25p. Edit files directly in this declared worktree lane. Load the pirfl skill from ~/.claude/skills/pirfl if no local copy is available.

Task: implement a bigger P2 operator-visibility slice for the workflow skill. Cover these backlog items together:

1. Run-level merged live output: add a run-level live output surface that merges all live agent streams with stable colored or labeled agent-name prefixes, so an operator can follow a whole workflow without selecting agents one-by-one.
2. Compact `workflow status/watch` monitor command: add a low-noise status/watch view with one compact row per run/agent: status, PID/process group when available, elapsed time, last event, latest output excerpt, tool-call count, token delta if available, and optional `--json`. Avoid printing full command lines by default because prompts are embedded in argv. Support long quiet waits without lead agents repeatedly dumping raw state.
3. Event rollover visibility: make it obvious in TUI/status when old events have rolled off and point users to durable artifacts/logs for full history.
4. First-class dogfood/backlog support: add a command or convention to create/register/append a durable dogfood backlog artifact for a run instead of relying on bounded event history.
5. Ergonomic layered-review workflows: document or scaffold a preferred implementation + ordered multi-model review plan pattern now that phase/job runner overrides exist. This can be a generator/template if small, or docs plus sample plans if a generator is too broad.

Acceptance criteria:
- Add focused tests for compact status/watch output, including a no-huge-command-line guarantee.
- Add tests/fixtures for merged run-level live output with at least two agents and stable prefixes.
- Add tests for event rollover visibility or a state marker that status/TUI surfaces.
- Add tests/docs for dogfood backlog artifact creation or append convention.
- Add tests/docs/sample coverage for layered review workflow ergonomics.
- Keep existing TUI snapshot, live telemetry, todo, token, duration, and workflow apply tests passing.

Likely files: scripts/workflow_ops.py, scripts/workflow_tui*.py, scripts/workflow_state.py, scripts/workflow_run_codex.py, scripts/wf, tests/test_workflow.py, tests/snapshots/*, references/operations.md, references/workflow-patterns.md, references/known-gaps-and-roadmap.md, SKILL.md, workflows/dogfood/*.workflow.json. Preserve style and avoid broad rewrites.

Run at minimum the new focused tests and WORKFLOW_TEST_MODE=fast python3 tests/test_workflow.py if practical. Commit your changes on the lane branch with message: feat(workflow): improve operator visibility e2e.

Return strict JSON with keys: status (complete|partial|blocked), files_changed, tests (array of command/result), behavior (array), blockers (array), last_commit, notes.

phases.name: structural-review
phases.title: Structural Review
phases.goal: Review operator-visibility implementation for test coverage and UX correctness.

jobs.name: mm3-operator-visibility-review
jobs.prompt:
You are already running as the ccc @mm3 review worker. Do not run ccc, do not spawn/delegate to another agent, and do not say you will use ccc @mm3. Work in the current cwd, which is the implementation worktree lane.

Review the P2 operator visibility implementation. Focus on compact status/watch output, merged live-output readability, no full-command/prompt leaks, event rollover signaling, dogfood backlog artifact behavior, layered-review ergonomics, and focused tests. If you find concrete issues, fix narrowly and commit with message: fix(workflow): address mm3 operator visibility review. If no concrete issues, do not commit.

Run focused tests relevant to any fixes. Return strict JSON with keys: status (pass|fixed|blocked), findings (array), tests (array), commits (array), notes.

phases.name: semantic-review
phases.title: Semantic Review
phases.goal: Deep semantic review of long-running operator workflow ergonomics.

jobs.name: glm51-operator-visibility-review
jobs.prompt:
You are already running as the ccc @glm51 review worker. Do not run ccc, do not spawn/delegate to another agent, and do not say you will use ccc @glm51. Work in the current cwd.

Perform a deep semantic review of the P2 operator visibility slice. Check status/watch semantics, JSON contract, long quiet wait ergonomics, TUI/status consistency, event rollover truthfulness, artifact-backed dogfood backlog behavior, and layered-review template usefulness. If you find concrete issues, fix narrowly and commit with message: fix(workflow): address glm51 operator visibility review. If no concrete issues, do not commit.

Run focused tests and the fast suite if practical. Return strict JSON with keys: status (pass|fixed|blocked), findings (array), tests (array), commits (array), notes.

phases.name: final-review
phases.title: Final Regression Review
phases.goal: Final regression review after implementation and model-diverse reviews.

jobs.name: mimo25p-operator-visibility-final
jobs.prompt:
You are already running as the ccc @mimo25p final review worker. Do not run ccc, do not spawn/delegate to another agent, and do not say you will use ccc @mimo25p. Work in the current cwd.

Final review the P2 operator visibility branch after prior review commits. Focus on regressions, docs, tests, and whether the new status/watch/live-output surfaces would have made this dogfood session less painful. If you find concrete issues, fix narrowly and commit with message: fix(workflow): address final operator visibility review. If no concrete issues, do not commit.

Run focused tests and WORKFLOW_TEST_MODE=fast python3 tests/test_workflow.py if practical. Return strict JSON with keys: status (pass|fixed|blocked), findings (array), tests (array), commits (array), notes.
